account.unableDelete: Unable to delete account right now.

prompts.confirmBody: This permanently removes your account and data.

momentum.ascending: Your consistency improved as the year progressed, so you're closing stronger than you started.
momentum.descending: Your pace slowed in recent months. Treat this as a signal to simplify and restart your core routine.
momentum.stable: You kept a steady rhythm through changing weeks, which is a strong base to build on.
momentum.main: This year, [[{{habitName}}]] became a central identity habit. {{momentumMsg}}

rhythm.weekend: Your strongest rhythm appears on weekends. Protect that window and replicate one part of it on weekdays.
rhythm.weekday: Your weekday structure is strong, while weekends are less consistent. A lighter weekend version could close that gap.
rhythm.consistent: Your execution stayed balanced across weekdays and weekends, showing reliable routine control.

consistency.high: You showed up on [[{{activeDays}}]] days this year. That's strong evidence of durable habit identity.
consistency.medium: You have a reliable base. Tightening one trigger or time slot could make this much more automatic.
consistency.low: You're still in foundation mode. Small repeatable wins matter more than intensity right now.

annual.experimental: You explored many habits this year. Choose fewer priorities next cycle so consistency can compound.
annual.fading: [[{{habitName}}]] has cooled recently. If it still matters, restart with an easier version this week.
annual.neglected: [[{{habitName}}]] has been inactive for [[{{days}}]] days. One quick rep can reopen momentum.

intro.elite: You completed [[{{count}}]] actions this week and stayed ahead of pace. Your systems are working.
intro.strong: You logged [[{{count}}]] completions this week with solid follow-through.
intro.balanced: You completed [[{{count}}]] actions this week. Some habits held, others need a clearer trigger.
intro.low: You logged [[{{count}}]] completions this week. Keep the floor low and focus on restart consistency.

momentum.highlight: [[{{habitName}}]] led this week at [[{{count}}/{{total}}]] days completed.

weekly.neglected: [[{{habitName}}]] was untouched this week. A 2-minute version tomorrow is enough to bring it back.

growth.recovery: Your second half outperformed your first half. That's meaningful rebound momentum.
growth.friction: Your early momentum faded later in the week. Add one end-of-week cue to reduce that drop-off.

intro.exceptional: With [[{{count}}]] completions so far, this month shows high execution and strong stability.
intro.solid: You reached [[{{count}}]] completions this month with dependable consistency.
intro.exploration: You logged [[{{count}}]] completions this month. Narrowing focus could improve carryover next month.
intro.low: You completed [[{{count}}]] actions this month. Use this month to reset scope and rebuild a simpler baseline.

momentum.growth: You're up [[{{delta}}%]] versus last month, a clear positive shift in execution.
momentum.cooling: You're down [[{{delta}}%]] versus last month. Reducing friction in one key habit should help stabilize next month.

rhythm.anchor: [[{{habitName}}]] was your anchor this month with [[{{count}}]] completions.

habitManager.title: My Habits
habitManager.noHabits: No habits yet. Start by adding one!
habitManager.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this habit? You will lose all its historical data.

analytics.notEnoughData: Not enough data to generate a story yet.

auth.resetFailed: We couldn't send the reset email. Please try again.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account before signing in.
auth.accountExists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.genericError: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
auth.tagline: A calming analytical tracker to build your habits

dashboardScreen.title: Dashboard
dashboardScreen.description: This is the mobile version of HabiCard.

aiAnalysis.premiumDesc: Get deep insights into your habits and life patterns with AI analysis. Unlock this feature with a premium subscription.
aiAnalysis.analyzeMessage: AI will analyze your recent habits & notes
aiAnalysis.mockContent: You tend to complete more habits on days when you record a "productive" mood early in the morning. Your consistency with "Reading" has improved by 15% this week.

habitInstructions.tap: Tap to check off a habit
habitInstructions.empty: Leave empty if you missed it

language.title: Choose language
language.subtitle: Set your app language. You can change this later in Settings.

theme.title: Choose color
theme.subtitle: Pick the same HabiCard color pairing used across the app.

cardStyle.title: Choose card size
cardStyle.subtitle: Preview both card layouts and pick the one you want as default.

habitsDemo.title: Habits in one place
habitsDemo.subtitle: Check off all your habits in one place.

tasksDemo.title: Tasks made simple
tasksDemo.subtitle: Create tasks and check them off as you are done.

journalDemo.title: Journal every day
journalDemo.subtitle: Update your daily journal in the same card flow.

weekStart.title: Start of week
weekStart.subtitle: Choose whether your week starts on Sunday or Monday.

onboarding.journalSample: This is where you can type into the journal.

cardStyleDescriptions.compact: Small progress badge in the header.
cardStyleDescriptions.large: Big day progress panel under the date.
